checks.detail: Real browser login shows success toast but remains on /login; authenticated shell does not mount.
Immediately after successful login toast, localStorage keys parselradar_token and parselradar_user are null.
Ctrl+F5/reload lands on /login due to missing session state.
Back/forward pages render without authenticated navbar/logout shell state.
Admin route clicks redirect to /login because auth state collapses post-login.
No repeated /auth/me storm observed during sampled run.
Real browser login with available credential set failed (Şifre hatalı). Valid Ayhan test credential not provided in session.
Real browser login with available credential set failed (Şifre hatalı). Valid Mahir test credential not provided in session.
Direct backend /auth/login with pilot@test.com returns 200 and ADMIN user payload.
